meaning: n.美国内战后利用南方不定局势谋利的人
examples: Carr is not camera-shy, as fans of the old Carpetbagger Oscar videos can attest.
The move has been seen as designed to wrongfoot the campaign organised by the internet web site Carpetbagger.com.
Her Republican opponent, Rick Lazio, called her a "carpetbagger" because she had not previously lived in New York.
